_comment: Branching dialogue trees per NPC role. Each role has a 'greeting' entry point. Choices can have requires (conditions) and effects (outcomes).

greeting.speaker: Merchant
greeting.text: Welcome to my shop! I've got the finest goods in the wasteland. What can I do for you?

show_wares.speaker: Merchant
show_wares.text: Take a look at what I've got. Everything's priced fairly — I promise.

rare_items.speaker: Merchant
rare_items.text: Ah, a connoisseur! I do have some special pieces... but they don't come cheap.

choices.text: I have the coin. Show me.

farewell.speaker: Merchant
farewell.text: Come back anytime! I'll be here.

greeting.speaker: Quest Giver
greeting.text: Ah, a traveler! I could use someone with your... skills. Interested in a job?

job_details.speaker: Quest Giver
job_details.text: There's been trouble with raiders nearby. Clear them out, and I'll make it worth your while.

payment.speaker: Quest Giver
payment.text: Depends on the job. But I always pay fair — and there's usually loot involved too.

choices.text: Tell me more about the job.

accept_quest.speaker: Quest Giver
accept_quest.text: Excellent! Check your mission tracker for details. Good luck out there.

farewell.speaker: Quest Giver
farewell.text: The offer stands if you change your mind.

greeting.speaker: Innkeeper
greeting.text: Welcome to the tavern! Pull up a chair and rest your weary feet.

choices.text: I need a place to stay.

rumors.speaker: Innkeeper
rumors.text: Word is, there's been strange activity near the rifts lately. Some say the creatures are getting bolder.

choices.text: Tell me more about the rifts.

rift_rumor.speaker: Innkeeper
rift_rumor.text: They say the rifts are opening more frequently. Some folks think it's a sign... others think it's just bad luck.

choices.text: Interesting. I'll keep my eyes open.

rest.speaker: Innkeeper
rest.text: I've got a room available. It's not much, but it's warm and safe. That'll be 10 EC.

rest_paid.speaker: Innkeeper
rest_paid.text: Room's yours. Rest up — you've earned it.

farewell.speaker: Innkeeper
farewell.text: Come back anytime! The door's always open.

greeting.speaker: Crafter
greeting.text: Need something built or repaired? I'm your person.

crafting.speaker: Crafter
crafting.text: I can work with most materials — metals, crystals, even that strange void stuff. Bring me what you've got.

materials.speaker: Crafter
materials.text: Always looking for iron ore and copper. If you've got starmetal, I'll pay top dollar.

farewell.speaker: Crafter
farewell.text: See you around. Don't be a stranger.

greeting.speaker: Armorer
greeting.text: Looking for protection? I've got armor that'll keep you alive out there.

show_armor.speaker: Armorer
show_armor.text: Every piece is handcrafted. Built to last — unlike that junk the raiders wear.

upgrade.speaker: Armorer
upgrade.text: Bring me the right materials and I can improve what you've got. Saves you buying new gear.

farewell.speaker: Armorer
farewell.text: Stay safe out there. Armor up before you head out.

greeting.speaker: Smith
greeting.text: The forge is hot and ready. What do you need?

weapon.speaker: Smith
weapon.text: I've got blades, blunts, and a few ranged options. Quality work — not like those rusted scrap pieces.

farewell.speaker: Smith
farewell.text: Come back when you're ready to deal.

greeting.speaker: Trainer
greeting.text: Ready to learn? I can teach you things that'll keep you alive out there.

training.speaker: Trainer
training.text: Combat techniques, survival skills, even a bit of rift lore. It all costs time and effort — but it's worth it.

accept_training.speaker: Trainer
accept_training.text: Alright then. Let's see what you've got. We'll start with the basics.

farewell.speaker: Trainer
farewell.text: The offer stands. Come back when you're ready.

greeting.speaker: Auctioneer
greeting.text: Welcome to the auction house! Bidding starts at a fair price.

auction.speaker: Auctioneer
auction.text: We've got some rare finds today. Take a look and place your bids.

farewell.speaker: Auctioneer
farewell.text: Happy bidding! Don't spend all your EC in one place.

greeting.speaker: Faction Representative
greeting.text: I represent our faction here. If you're looking to make an impression, you've come to the right place.

faction_info.speaker: Faction Representative
faction_info.text: We're a force to be reckoned with. Help us out, and we'll remember your loyalty.

faction_work.speaker: Faction Representative
faction_work.text: We've got tasks that need doing. Prove your worth, and you'll earn our trust.

farewell.speaker: Faction Representative
farewell.text: Think it over. We're always looking for capable people.

greeting.speaker: Wanderer
greeting.text: Hey there, traveler. Nice to see a friendly face around here.

stories.speaker: Wanderer
stories.text: I've seen things out there in the wastes... things that'd make your hair stand on end. But also beauty — in the strangest places.

more_stories.speaker: Wanderer
more_stories.text: Once I found an old-world relic half-buried in the ash. Still worked. Some things from before... they endure.

life.speaker: Wanderer
life.text: Day by day, same as everyone. We survive, we adapt. That's the way of things now.

farewell.speaker: Wanderer
farewell.text: Safe travels, friend. Watch your back out there.

greeting.speaker: Riftspire Portal
greeting.text: The portal hums with energy. A destination awaits.
